ham.subject: Jira Ticket #12345: Issue Resolved – Code Merge Completed
ham.body:
Hi Team,

I’m pleased to inform you that the issue reported in Jira ticket #12345 has been fully resolved. The corresponding pull request (PR #6789) has been merged into the main branch on GitHub.

**Resolution Summary**
- Bug: NullPointerException in the user authentication module
- Fix: Updated the null check logic and added unit tests
- PR: https://github.com/yourorg/yourrepo/pull/6789

All automated tests now pass, and the deployment pipeline has successfully completed.

Please pull the latest changes and run your local regression tests. If you encounter any regressions, let me know immediately.

Thanks for your patience and collaboration.

Best regards,
Alex Johnson
Software Engineer
acme@example.com

spam.subject: Urgent: QuickBooks Invoice Payment Required – Immediate Action Needed
spam.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

QuickBooks Account Services has detected an unpaid invoice (Invoice #QB-987654) that is now 45 days overdue. Failure to settle this invoice will result in the suspension of your QuickBooks Online account and the loss of all data stored on the platform.

**Invoice Details**
- Amount Due: $1,250.00
- Due Date: 15 May 2024
- Description: Monthly subscription and service fees

To avoid any disruption, please log in to your QuickBooks portal and complete the payment within the next 48 hours. Click the link below to review and pay your invoice:

<URL>

If you believe this is an error or have already paid, please reply to this email with your transaction receipt attached.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Rapid Billing Team
QuickBooks Support
support@<URL>

If you have any questions, call us at 1-800-123-4567.
